title: GitHub Profile, Repository Health, and Verifiable Work
description: A profile has a dense contribution graph and many forked tutorials, but reviewers cannot find three relevant, runnable, maintained, or honestly attributed examples. Learners cumulatively produce selective GitHub evidence route through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Select a small set of projects by target-role relevance, independent contribution, evidence strength, recency, and safe disclosure.
Write a concise profile route that helps a reviewer reach role, proof, boundaries, contact choice, and accessible alternatives.
Create a fast repository entry path through purpose, users, status, demonstration, setup, test, architecture, and limitation evidence.
